rules.rule_text:
rule andromeda
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2014-03-13"
		description = "Identify Andromeda"

	strings:
		$config = {1c 1c 1d 03 49 47 46}
		$c1 = "hsk\\ehs\\dihviceh\\serhlsethntrohntcohurrehem\\chsyst"

	condition:
		all of them
}
